chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) Of the fee collected under Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) for a permit:

(1) 50 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund; and

(2) the other 50 percent shall be divided equally among all counties designated in the permit application under Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) (a)(2).

(b) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B. 2620 ), Sec. 14(1), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.324 — Disposition of Fee

(a) Of the fee collected under Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) for a permit:

    (1) 50 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund; and

    (2) the other 50 percent shall be divided equally among all counties designated in the permit application under Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) (a)(2).

(b) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B. 2620 ), Sec. 14(1), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B.2620), Sec. 14(1), eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Of the fee collected under Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) for a permit:
50 percent of the amount collected shall be deposited to the credit of the state highway fund; and
the other 50 percent shall be divided equally among all counties designated in the permit application under Section 623.322 (Qualification; Requirements) (a)(2).

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1129 (H.B. 2620 ), Sec. 14(1), eff. September 1, 2019.
